column5: Raise automated test coverage toward the policy floor in pyproject.toml ([tool.coverage.report] fail_under, currently 55%): audit existing tests for gaps, add edge-case tests for auth (expired tokens, malformed JWTs, duplicate registration), add integration tests for health endpoints with database down scenario, add tenant middleware tests. Acceptance: make test passes with coverage at or above fail_under (adjust target in summary if policy floor changes). Definition of done: coverage ratchet satisfied; no regression in existing suites.
column6: 1) Run make test and confirm coverage ≥ fail_under in pyproject.toml. 2) Add auth edge-case tests (expired/malformed JWT, wrong key, invalid sub, unknown user). 3) Add tenancy test for malformed Bearer when multi-tenancy enabled. 4) Follow prompts/queue_worker_executor.md — do not edit queue CSV.
column9: qc-2026-04-16 | deps cleared: Q-002 archived done

column5: Full-stack template integration — documentation and ADR: MUST use mechanical import from the fork github.com/MHughesDev/fastapi-template (default branch master; pin a commit SHA in docs). Document exact commands only — no AI-generated file trees: e.g. git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/MHughesDev/fastapi-template.git /tmp/fastapi-template-vendor, git sparse-checkout set frontend backend compose.yml (optional), rsync -a vendor-path/frontend/ apps/web/ (later steps). Add docs/integrations/full-stack-fastapi-template.md plus docs/adr/ noting fork URL, upstream parent fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template, SHA pin, and copy-vs-port matrix (bulk-copy frontend from clone; never wholesale-replace apps/api; backend read from clone path backend/app for porting). Acceptance: README or docs/README links; a human can reproduce vendor tree with documented git/rsync only. Out of scope: writing integration code beyond docs. Definition of done: make queue:validate passes.
column6: 1) Clone MHughesDev/fastapi-template to a temp path; pin SHA in docs. 2) Write docs/integrations/full-stack-fastapi-template.md and docs/adr/* using git/rsync commands only — no invented file trees. 3) Cross-link from README or docs/README.

column5: Vendor sync script MUST clone or update from github.com/MHughesDev/fastapi-template (env FULL_STACK_TEMPLATE_REMOTE defaulting to that URL) using git clone --depth 1 or git fetch in a cache dir; use rsync/cp --no-target-directory or rsync -a to copy frontend/, compose.yml, compose.override.yml, compose.traefik.yml, deployment.md, development.md, scripts/generate-client.sh, .github/workflows/playwright.yml (etc.) into repo paths or docs/vendor-upstream/ for review. Implement scripts/vendor/sync-full-stack-template.sh plus Makefile vendor:template-sync; support --dry-run and --ref SHA; NEVER overwrite apps/api unless FULL_STACK_TEMPLATE_FORCE_API=1. Forbidden: recreating the template with AI — files must originate from git checkout. Acceptance: one make target runs on Linux; tree matches fork at pinned ref. Dependencies: Q-004.
column6: 1) Implement scripts/vendor/sync-full-stack-template.sh cloning from FULL_STACK_TEMPLATE_REMOTE. 2) rsync/cp from vendor into repo or docs/vendor-upstream/. 3) Add make vendor:template-sync. 4) Never overwrite apps/api without FULL_STACK_TEMPLATE_FORCE_API=1.

column5: Populate apps/web/ by COPYING the fork tree: after Q-005, run rsync -a --delete (or cp -a) from <vendor>/frontend/ to apps/web/ so all 116+ files come from MHughesDev/fastapi-template. Optionally copy root package.json and bun.lock from fork to repo root only if workspaces require it — still from clone, not hand-authored. Minimal edits allowed: vite.config.ts proxy, openapi-ts.config.ts base URL, .env.example lines — small patches only. Wire codegen: adapt fork scripts/generate-client.sh by copy-then-sed to call apps.api.src.main:create_app and PYTHONPATH=. Forbidden: scaffolding a new Vite app from scratch. Acceptance: diff shows vendor provenance; bun or npm run build in apps/web succeeds. Dependencies: Q-005.
column6: 1) rsync vendor frontend/ to apps/web/. 2) Patch only vite proxy, openapi-ts, env as needed. 3) Wire generate-client to apps.api.src.main:create_app. 4) Verify frontend build.

column5: Backend parity MUST start from cloned fork path backend/app/ (copy reference files into docs/vendor-upstream/backend-app/ or keep vendor clone); implement Items and user/admin behaviors by porting line-by-line from copied files into apps/api/src/ contexts — do not invent routes without template source open beside you. Use git diff between vendor/backend and apps/api to verify. Preserve PYTHON_PROCEDURES, tenancy, MCP. Acceptance: OpenAPI parity with template routes where applicable; make test and typecheck pass. Out of scope: replacing apps/api layout with template backend folder. Dependencies: Q-006.
column6: 1) Keep vendor backend/app/ open while porting. 2) Add items/admin routes under apps/api/src/ per PYTHON_PROCEDURES. 3) Alembic migrations; OpenAPI parity for client.
column9: mechanical-import policy | port not paste monolith

column5: Email and recovery: COPY from fork backend/app/email-templates/ and related mail utilities (paths from vendor clone) into apps/api; COPY patterns from backend/app/utils.py or equivalent — then adapt imports and Settings. Optional: copy Mailcatcher service stanza from fork compose into our compose merge (Q-009). Secrets only via config.py Settings. Forbidden: writing HTML email from scratch without vendor copy. Acceptance: files traceable to fork; mailcatcher profile works; docs list env vars. Dependencies: Q-007.
column6: 1) Copy email-templates and mail helpers from vendor clone. 2) Extend Settings for SMTP. 3) Optional mailcatcher from fork compose. 4) Document env vars.

column5: Docker Compose: COPY fork compose.yml, compose.override.yml, compose.traefik.yml from MHughesDev/fastapi-template clone into merge base (e.g. docs/vendor-upstream/ or patch queue), then merge into docker-compose.yml by hand-editing service names/paths to apps/api and apps/web — do not author compose from zero. Add profiles web and mailcatcher matching fork behavior. Acceptance: docker compose --profile web up; default api-only unchanged. Dependencies: Q-006.
column6: 1) Copy fork compose files to merge base. 2) Merge into docker-compose.yml with apps/api and apps/web paths. 3) Add profiles web and mailcatcher.

column5: CI: COPY fork .github/workflows/playwright.yml and relevant test-backend patterns from vendor clone into .github/workflows/ (e.g. .github/vendor-playwright.yml) then merge into existing ci.yml — use git show or cp from cloned repo at pinned SHA. Extend our ci.yml with Node jobs referencing copied workflow as template. Forbidden: writing Playwright CI YAML from scratch without fork file as base. Retain Python matrix and security.yml. Acceptance: both stacks in CI. Dependencies: Q-006 Q-009.
column6: 1) cp fork .github/workflows/playwright.yml (and peers) then merge into ci.yml. 2) Keep existing Python CI jobs. 3) Document secrets if any.

column5: Init and web profile: enable-web.sh MUST invoke vendor sync (Q-005) or document one-liner git clone MHughesDev/fastapi-template + rsync frontend to apps/web — no manual recreation. discard-web.sh --force removes copied stack. Update profile-resolver and procedures to state fork-first workflow. Acceptance: profile enables without AI-generated frontend tree. Dependencies: Q-006.
column6: 1) Wire enable-web.sh to vendor sync or document clone+rsync. 2) discard-web.sh --force removes apps/web stack. 3) Update profile-resolver and init docs.

column5: Narrative docs: merge our README agent-factory story with fork README sections COPIED or summarized from cloned MHughesDev/fastapi-template README.md (attribute source). Replace docs/optional-clients/web.md; fix apps/web/AGENTS.md to describe copied Vite stack. CHANGELOG entry cites fork SHA. Forbidden: inventing full-stack setup steps not matching fork. Acceptance: docs:check passes. Dependencies: Q-004 Q-008 Q-011.
column6: 1) Merge README narrative with fork README (attribute). 2) Update docs/optional-clients/web.md and apps/web/AGENTS.md. 3) CHANGELOG cites fork SHA.

column5: Tests: COPY fork frontend/tests/*.spec.ts and auth setup from vendor clone into apps/web/tests/ then patch base URLs and env; backend pytest additions may follow ported routes from Q-007-Q-008. Prefer copying Playwright config from fork playwright.config.ts before editing. Acceptance: make test green; Playwright job green. Out of scope: writing E2E specs without fork files as starting point. Dependencies: Q-007 Q-008 Q-010.
column6: 1) Copy fork frontend/tests into apps/web/tests; patch URLs. 2) Backend tests for new routes. 3) Playwright green in CI.

column5: Full-stack template integration — documentation and ADR pass: add docs/integrations/full-stack-fastapi-template.md and a short ADR under docs/adr/ recording upstream source (github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template), default branch master, pin strategy (commit SHA or tag), and mechanical reproduction steps (git clone --depth 1, file counts: backend 64 files, frontend 116 files, 233 total non-git). Document copy-vs-port matrix: bulk-copy frontend tree; do not wholesale-replace apps/api; list every top-level template object category (backend/app, compose files, .github/workflows, scripts, hooks, .copier, img). Acceptance: docs committed and cross-linked from README or docs/README. Definition of done: make queue:validate passes; a new contributor can run documented clone/rsync steps without AI. Out of scope: implementing integration code.

Add vendor automation to import upstream files without token-heavy regeneration: create scripts/vendor/ (e.g. sync-full-stack-template.sh) that uses shallow git clone or git archive of pinned upstream ref, supports dry-run, and rsync/cp template frontend/ to apps/staging-web/ or directly to apps/web/ behind a flag; optionally sync root compose.yml, compose.override.yml, compose.traefik.yml, deployment.md, development.md into docs/vendor-upstream/ or deploy/vendor/ for diff review. Include safety checks (do not overwrite apps/api without explicit flag). Acceptance: script documented in Makefile target vendor:template-sync; runs on Linux CI. Definition of done: one command reproduces file tree from upstream. Out of scope: merging Python backends. Dependencies: Q-004.

Bulk-import template frontend (116 files) into apps/web/: after Q-005 vendor path, copy template frontend/* preserving Vite+React+TanStack+shadcn structure; add/adapt root package.json workspaces or document apps/web-only install (template uses bun workspaces + bun.lock); port scripts/generate-client.sh to export OpenAPI from apps.api.src.main:create_app using PYTHONPATH=. and write openapi.json consumed by openapi-ts in apps/web; fix vite.config.ts proxy and env prefixes. Acceptance: bun or npm run build succeeds in apps/web; generate-client Makefile target works. Definition of done: CI-local manual steps documented. Out of scope: Next.js migration. Dependencies: Q-005.

Backend parity with full-stack template features inside apps/api modular layout: port Items CRUD and user/admin API behaviors from template backend/app/api/routes (items, users, login patterns) into new or existing bounded contexts; align OpenAPI tags and paths where feasible for generated client; preserve PYTHON_PROCEDURES (router→service→repository), tenancy hooks, and MCP. Map template SQLModel models to our SQLAlchemy 2 async patterns or introduce compatible models with Alembic migrations. Acceptance: OpenAPI lists items and admin user operations; integration tests cover happy paths. Definition of done: make test and make typecheck pass. Out of scope: dropping tenant isolation. Dependencies: Q-006.

Email and password recovery parity: port template email-templates (mjml build optional), utils.send_email, reset-password and recover-password routes, and SMTP-related settings into apps/api/src/config.py and new modules; ensure secrets via Settings only. Wire docker optional mailcatcher service matching template compose patterns. Acceptance: local flow works against mailcatcher profile; tests mock SMTP. Definition of done: docs list new env vars in docs/development/environment-vars.md. Out of scope: production SMTP provider selection. Dependencies: Q-007.

Docker Compose full-stack merge: integrate template compose.yml services (frontend build, proxy, db, adminer if present) with our docker-compose.yml naming; add compose profiles web and mailcatcher; optional compose.traefik.yml as deploy/docker/extra/; keep api-only path as default. Acceptance: docker compose --profile web up works; api-only compose unchanged for default workflow. Definition of done: deploy/docker/README.md or docs/operations/docker.md updated. Out of scope: Kubernetes rewrite. Dependencies: Q-006.

CI merge for monorepo: extend .github/workflows/ci.yml with Node setup and cached install for apps/web (lint, tsc, build); add or merge Playwright workflow based on template .github/workflows/playwright.yml with service containers; retain existing Python matrix, migrate-dry-run, docs checks; avoid deleting security.yml. Acceptance: PR runs both stacks; failures are actionable. Definition of done: document required GitHub secrets if any. Out of scope: staging deploy workflows from template. Dependencies: Q-006 Q-009.

Initialization and optional web profile: update skills/init/profile-resolver.py and scripts/profiles/enable-web.sh to install Vite stack from vendor script or document post-clone step; rewrite scripts/profiles/discard-web.sh to support --force hard delete of apps/web including node_modules and lockfiles after confirmation; align idea.md and make profile:enable PROFILE=web with optional frontend. Acceptance: init-from-idea can complete with web disabled; discard-web --force removes full frontend. Definition of done: docs/procedures/initialize-repo.md and add-optional-app-profile.md updated. Out of scope: mobile profile. Dependencies: Q-006.

Repository narrative and agent contracts: merge README value props (agent factory, queue, skills, setup.sh) with full-stack quickstart (API+web+compose); replace stub docs/optional-clients/web.md with Vite+openapi-ts reality; update apps/web/AGENTS.md (remove incorrect Next.js-only assertions or scope them as alternative); add CHANGELOG entry. Acceptance: docs:check passes; new env vars documented. Definition of done: AGENTS.md cross-links integration doc. Out of scope: rewriting all skills. Dependencies: Q-004 Q-008 Q-011.

Regression and E2E coverage: add/adjust pytest for new routes and email flows; ensure Playwright specs from template (admin, items, auth, reset password) pass against composed stack; align frontend tests/config with our URLs. Acceptance: make test green; Playwright job green on CI. Definition of done: flake policy documented if timing issues. Out of scope: perf testing. Dependencies: Q-007 Q-008 Q-010.
